text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, May 26. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Sleep quality is so important. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Got it, Mike. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Updating our financial spreadsheets. First United Mortgage offered 5.8% with zero points. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Smart financial planning. A rate of 5.8% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Good focus area. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that managing some allergy issues today. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've logged your vitals. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the secure messaging specs for Vertex Health. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I checked the recent logs for that. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Great update. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Smart financial planning. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: I'm reviewing the billing integration specs for Vertex Health. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Let's break this down. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
